overview: A property rental and listing platform where users can post and browse vacancies across five categories (flat, hotel, house, convention hall, shifting service), with multiple image uploads, flexible location search, and user authentication.
features: Editable user profile (name, address, email, phone)
Post vacancy listings with multiple image uploads
Five listing categories: flat, hotel, house, convention hall, shifting service
Browse and search listings by category and location text
Full listing detail view with image gallery
